login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the workspace.
login.noticePasswordReset: Password reset complete. Sign in with your new password.

register.title: Create workspace
register.subtitle: Create your workspace to get started.
register.workspaceSlugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
register.terms: By creating a workspace you agree to the Terms of Service.

forgotPassword.title: Password recovery
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your workspace email address and we will send reset instructions if the account is eligible.
forgotPassword.heroBody: Request a time-limited reset link. The response stays generic so account existence is never exposed.
forgotPassword.successBody: If the account exists, password reset instructions have been issued.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Use the recovery link from your email to complete a password reset.
resetPassword.heroBody: Apply a new password to invalidate the issued recovery token and revoke any active sessions.
resetPassword.errorMismatch: The new password confirmation does not match.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Complete the required password rotation before continuing into the workspace.
changePassword.heroBody: Your administrator issued a temporary password. Rotate it now before accessing workspace resources.
changePassword.protectedActionBody: Your current session is restricted until this password update succeeds.
changePassword.errorMismatch: The new password confirmation does not match.

shell.heroSubtitle: Manage agent workflows, approvals, and audit trails from a secure operations dashboard.

registerShell.heroSubtitle: Secure autonomous agents with encrypted workflows, dynamic secret injection, and enterprise-grade key rotation.

verificationBanner.title: Email verification pending
verificationBanner.body: Verify your email address to unlock full workspace features.
verificationBanner.resent: Verification email resent. Check your inbox.
